scripts.deploy:http: gcloud functions deploy mrkiHttpHandler --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --entry-point mrkiHttpHandler
scripts.deploy:pubsub: gcloud functions deploy mrkiPubSubHandler --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-topic mrki-events --entry-point mrkiPubSubHandler
scripts.deploy:storage: gcloud functions deploy mrkiStorageHandler --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-bucket mrki-data --entry-point mrkiStorageHandler
scripts.deploy:scheduled: gcloud functions deploy mrkiScheduledHandler --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-topic scheduled-events --entry-point mrkiScheduledHandler
